title: juncus requienii
intro: Juncus requienii, also known as Requien's rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juncus requienii include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Juncus requienii can be made by infusing the plant in water or oil, and are often used as a topical treatment or ingested as a tea.
